request.description: These `params` control how the **Google News Search Export** crawler behaves — including language, recency filters, and result limits. ➡️ These parameters are specific to the **Google News Search Export** crawler. _Refer to the_ [Constructing the params Object](#13eb068f-2bae-4603-941e-9f36038fb379) _section to understand how to format and apply them._ | Parameter | Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | **language** | string | Country edition and UI language for Google News. Example: `"English (United States)"`. | | **time_range** | string | Filter news by recency. Allowed values: `Any time`, `Past hour`, `Past 24h`, `Past week`, `Past year`. | | **max_results** | integer | Maximum number of articles to scrape. If left blank, extracts all news since 2005-01-01. | • If `max_results` set ≤ 100 → no date filter is applied. • If `max_results` set > 100 → scraper breaks the span into daily windows and fetches news day by day. --- ### ⚠️ **Additional Notes** - Leaving **max_results** blank and **time_range** as `Any time` will pull every article back to 2005-01-01. - Setting **max_results** > 100 enables automatic date-windowing to avoid huge single-query spans.

response.name: Example

request.description:
These `result` objects are returned by the **Google News Search Export** crawler. Each record represents one news article.

| **Field**            | Type            | Description                                                                                     |
|----------------------|-----------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **id**               | integer         | Unique identifier for this result record.                                                      |
| **object**           | string          | Always `"result"`.                                                                              |
| **squid**            | string          | Hash ID of the squid that produced this result.                                                 |
| **run**              | string          | Hash ID of the run during which this result was scraped.                                        |
| **functions**        | object or null  | Reserved for any function-specific metadata (currently `null`).                                 |
| **image**            | string (URL)    | URL of the article’s featured image, if available.                                              |
| **native_id**        | integer         | Original identifier assigned by the news source.                                                |
| **published_at**     | string (ISO)    | Publication timestamp of the article (e.g. `"2025-07-03T13:03:07Z"`).                            |
| **scraping_time**    | string (ISO)    | Timestamp when this result was fetched (e.g. `"2025-07-04T03:59:27.386Z"`).                      |
| **short_description**| string          | Brief summary or excerpt of the news article.                                                   |
| **source**           | string          | Name of the news source or publisher.                                                           |
| **title**            | string          | Headline or title of the news article.                                                          |
| **url**              | string (URL)    | Direct link to the full article on the publisher’s site.                                        |

response.name: Example
